title: cryptantha clementina
intro: Cryptantha clementina is a species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cryptantha clementina include its potential to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
